suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton, DOB 1961-08-31, at 08330 Robert Stravenue, Garciaberg, AL, engaged in potential structuring. On 2025-07-31, multiple ATM withdrawals totaling $16,932.36 and a cash deposit of $5,500.55 were made, all just below $10,000. On 2025-08-02, a $6,933.66 cash deposit was made. These transactions, from accounts CUST_0057_ACC_1 and CUST_0057_ACC_3, suggest attempts to avoid CTR thresholds. Clayton's high-risk rating and transaction volume exceeding her annual income of $163,820 further support suspicion. Activity occurred across branches including Eastside Center and Northgate Mall.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Multiple transactions just below $10,000, especially on 2025-07-31 and 2025-08-02, indicate potential structuring to avoid reporting thresholds. High-risk rating and high transaction volume compared to income support suspicion.
